---
title: "Getting started"
format: html
---

## Vaccine Characterisation

```{r, echo=FALSE, eval = TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# load results
library(omopgenerics)
library(here)
results <- importSummarisedResult(path = here("vaccine"))
```

### Attrition plot

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(CohortCharacteristics)
plotCohortAttrition(result = results)
```

### Vaccine Characterisation

```{r, echo=FALSE}
#library(CohortCharacteristics)
#tableCharacteristics(result = results, header="Vaccination campaign")
```
